page: OVHcloud l4-180 is a dedicated GPU-accelerated server powered by an AMD EPYC 9454 processor with 45 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture running at 2.75 GHz. The system operates without hyperthreading, allocating a full physical core per vCPU. It is equipped with 180 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4 GB of RAM per core. Graphics and parallel processing acceleration are driven by dual NVIDIA L4 GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined 48 GB of VRAM. Local storage is provided by a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is supported by a 16 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark results place this server in the top tier for both single-core and multi-core CPU performance under stress-ng workloads. Memory subsystem performance is also highly competitive, with Passmark memory scores in the top 10% and uncached read memory bandwidth reaching 183.73 GB/sec. The dual NVIDIA L4 GPUs enable top-tier LLM inference performance, processing prompts at 2768.53 tokens/sec for medium 7B models and maintaining strong generation speeds even for large 70B models.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the l4-180 offers high resource density by bundling dedicated AMD EPYC compute cores, dual enterprise-grade L4 GPUs, and fast NVMe storage into a single KVM-virtualized instance. This configuration avoids the overhead of hyperthreading while maximizing parallel processing capabilities. It is highly suited for workloads such as large language model inference, machine learning training, ray tracing, data science pipelines, and high-throughput database operations.
description: The OVHcloud l4-180 is a high-density GPU-accelerated server designed for demanding parallel computing workloads. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9454 processor, it features 45 dedicated physical cores operating at 2.75 GHz, paired with 180 GB of RAM and a 400 GB NVMe SSD. Acceleration is driven by dual NVIDIA L4 GPUs from the Ada Lovelace architecture, providing a total of 48 GB VRAM. This hardware configuration delivers top-tier performance, with stress-ng CPU benchmarks and LLM inference speeds for 7B and 70B models ranking in the top 10% and top 25% respectively. Network throughput is supported by a 16 Gbps baseline. The server's architecture makes it highly efficient for machine learning inference, data science, ray tracing, and database operations, offering a robust balance of dedicated compute, high-speed memory, and enterprise-grade graphics acceleration.
og_description: OVHcloud l4-180 is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 45 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 180 GB RAM, a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and dual NVIDIA L4 GPUs with 48 GB total VRAM for top-tier LLM inference and compute workloads.
meta_description: OVHcloud l4-180 is a GPU-accelerated server with 45 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 180 GB RAM, and dual NVIDIA L4 GPUs for high-performance AI and compute workloads.
tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC server with dual NVIDIA L4 GPUs and NVMe storage, optimized for high-throughput AI inference and parallel compute.
bullet_points: Dual NVIDIA L4 GPUs with 48 GB total VRAM
45 dedicated AMD EPYC 9454 physical cores at 2.75 GHz
180 GB RAM and 400 GB NVMe SSD local storage
Top-tier LLM inference and multi-core CPU benchmark performance
Optimized for machine learning, ray tracing, and database operations
